results.description:
DESCRIPTION:THE OVERALL OBJECTIVE OF THIS RESEARCH IS TO CONDUCT FIELD AND LABORATORY RESEARCH TO ENABLE ACCURATE MODELING OF INTERVENTIONS INTENDED TO REDUCE INDOOR WOODSMOKE EXPOSURES. THE PROJECT WILL IMPROVE UNDERSTANDING OF OUTDOOR TO INDOOR AIR POLLUTANT TRANSPORT IN SINGLE-FAMILY DETACHED HOMES; EVALUATE COMMERCIAL AND LOW-COST AIR-CLEANING APPROACHES FOR PARTICLE AND GAS-PHASE POLLUTANTS; CHARACTERIZE POLYCYCLIC AROMATIC HYDROCARBONS (PAHS) ON INDOOR SURFACES TO ELUCIDATE HOW INDOOR WOODSMOKE MAY CAUSE LONG-TERM EXPOSURE TO PAHS INDOORS. 

ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.

DESCRIPTION:
THE OVERALL OBJECTIVE OF THIS RESEARCH IS TO CONDUCT FIELD AND LABORATORY RESEARCH TO ENABLE ACCURATE MODELING OF INTERVENTIONS INTENDED TO REDUCE INDOOR WOODSMOKE EXPOSURES. THE PROJECT WILL IMPROVE UNDERSTANDING OF OUTDOOR TO INDOOR AIR POLLUTANT TRANSPORT IN SINGLE-FAMILY DETACHED HOMES; EVALUATE COMMERCIAL AND LOW-COST AIR-CLEANING APPROACHES FOR PARTICLE AND GAS-PHASE POLLUTANTS; CHARACTERIZE POLYCYCLIC AROMATIC HYDROCARBONS (PAHS) ON INDOOR SURFACES TO ELUCIDATE HOW INDOOR WOODSMOKE MAY CAUSE LONG-TERM EXPOSURE TO PAHS INDOORS. 

THIS AMENDMENT CONTAINS THE UPDATED TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR THIS AWARD.

.
